## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and improvements for blog posts and graphics.](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content improvements: Focus on engaging openings, dense mid-sections, and SEO-friendly structure](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Graphics: Move away from "corporate Memphis" style towards clean vector art aesthetic](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New interactive tool idea: Generate objections and responses for sales scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Refinement

  - [Avoid overuse of em-dashes and phrases like "It's not just X, it's Y"](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Balance SEO needs with reader engagement](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Structure articles with impactful openings (250 words) followed by denser, list-style content](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Reduce use of bullet points and long H-tag headers with colons](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)

### AI Writing Tools

  - [Claude (3.7 version) performs better for certain tasks, especially outlines and structure](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [GPT-4 excels at rewriting company copy](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Combining different AI models yields best results for various content needs](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Graphics and Imagery

  - [Current Midjourney-generated images resemble outdated "corporate Memphis" style](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Aim for clean vector art aesthetic, similar to Exec's new website design](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Sean to provide a "swipe file" of inspiring examples for future graphics](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)

### Interactive Content Idea

  - [Develop a tool where users input product details and receive potential sales objections with responses](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Integrate this interactive element into blog posts to increase engagement and provide practical value](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sean to provide comments on submitted blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Sean to create a swipe file of preferred graphic styles using Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Explore implementation of the interactive sales objection tool for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Continue refining content based on feedback, focusing on engaging openings and SEO-friendly structure](https://fathom.video/share/bM6Zd_7cxxLpB6Gr2B6Xtc6ohBnwKp_d?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
